title: Roasted Vegetables
excerpt: Ingredients 300 g Mixed-colour baby carrots 300 g Yellow baby marrows 300 g Green beans or baby snow peas 300 g Tomatoes – preferably still on the vine 90 ml Lemon-flavoured olive or avocado oil 30 ml Finely grated garlic 15 ml Finely grated lemon zest 15 ml Lemon juice Coarse salt and black pepper to taste Method Make the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 300 g Mixed-colour baby carrots
  • 300 g Yellow baby marrows
  • 300 g Green beans or baby snow peas
  • 300 g Tomatoes – preferably still on the vine
  • 90 ml Lemon-flavoured olive or avocado oil
  • 30 ml Finely grated garlic
  • 15 ml Finely grated lemon zest
  • 15 ml Lemon juice
  • Coarse salt and black pepper to taste

Method

Pre-cook the carrots, baby marrows and snow peas a little beforehand; just barely done but still firm. Drain and grill them – one kind at a time, tomatoes included – in a griddle pan until they're smoky and have dark stripes on the vegetables. Put the grilled vegetables in a large glass mixing bowl.

Mix the oil, garlic, zest and lemon juice together and pour it over the warm vegetables. Season with salt and black pepper and serve.

Makes 6 – 8 portions to go with any main course.

Easy!
